generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed in permafrost regions to measure ground thermal state with ±0.1°C accuracy at 15-minute intervals"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance SoilMoistureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Capacitive soil moisture sensor with 1% volumetric water content resolution, sampling every 30 minutes in active layer"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

instance GroundDisplacementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Fiber-optic distributed temperature sensing (DTS) system measuring ground deformation with 1mm precision at 10m spatial resolution"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted
]

instance AtmosphericPressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Barometric pressure sensor with 0.1hPa accuracy, logging hourly data for atmospheric correction of ground measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance SoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor
]

instance GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GroundDisplacementSensor
]

instance AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AtmosphericPressureSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PermafrostThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coupled heat and mass transfer model (STOMP) simulating active layer thickness with 1-day time step and 0.1m spatial resolution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostModelingEnabler
]

instance SoilHydrologicalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "HYDRUS-1D model parameterized for organic-rich permafrost soils with Richards' equation solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SoilModelingEnabler
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series temperature data from 2020-2023 at 15-minute resolution with quality flags for sensor drift correction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostModelingEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Volumetric water content measurements with uncertainty estimates from 2021-2023, aggregated to daily averages"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SoilModelingEnabler, DataValidationEnabler
]

instance GroundDisplacementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Spatial deformation profiles with temporal alignment to temperature measurements for thermokarst detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StructuralAnalysisEnabler
]

instance AtmosphericCorrectionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Barometric pressure data used for correcting ground displacement measurements via elastic deformation models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PermafrostModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance computing cluster running STOMP model with 64-core parallelization and GPU acceleration for sensitivity analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PermafrostThermalService, ClimateImpactService
]

instance SoilModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "HPC-optimized HYDRUS-1D solver with adaptive mesh refinement for organic soil layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables SoilMoistureService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Three.js-based web application with WebGL acceleration for 3D permafrost temperature visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService
]

instance DataPreprocessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based pipeline using Pandas and NumPy for sensor calibration, outlier detection, and atmospheric correction"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataQualityService
]

instance StructuralAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB-based finite element analysis toolkit for thermokarst deformation pattern recognition"
    DTDFVocab:enables InfrastructureRiskService
]

instance DataValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning validator using Random Forest to detect sensor anomalies with 95% precision"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataQualityService
]

// C6: Services
instance PermafrostThermalService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time active layer thickness prediction with ±5cm accuracy using Bayesian updating"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActiveLayerInsight, ThawDepthAlert
]

instance SoilMoistureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Seasonal moisture deficit forecasting with 10-day lead time for agricultural planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides MoistureDeficitInsight, IrrigationRecommendation
]

instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard with real-time sensor feeds and model outputs accessible via REST API"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemHealthInsight, OperationalStatusAlert
]

instance InfrastructureRiskService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated risk assessment for permafrost infrastructure using deformation thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides RiskLevelInsight, MaintenanceRecommendation
]

instance ClimateImpactService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Scenario analysis of 2100 permafrost degradation under RCP4.5 and RCP8.5 pathways"
    DTDFVocab:provides ClimateScenarioInsight, PolicyRecommendation
]

instance DataQualityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated data quality monitoring with alerting for sensor failures and measurement drift"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataQualityInsight, SensorMaintenanceAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ActiveLayerInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current active layer thickness with 90% confidence interval derived from thermal model and sensor fusion"
]

instance ThawDepthAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert when active layer exceeds critical depth threshold for infrastructure stability"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MoistureDeficitInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cumulative moisture deficit over growing season with comparison to 30-year climatology"
]

instance IrrigationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggested irrigation schedule based on soil moisture forecasts and crop water requirements"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Composite health score (0-100) for permafrost monitoring system based on sensor reliability and model performance"
]

instance OperationalStatusAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "System-wide alert when any sensor or model component falls below operational thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RiskLevelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Categorical risk assessment (Low/Medium/High) for infrastructure based on deformation rates and historical data"
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Prioritized maintenance tasks with estimated costs and urgency based on risk assessment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ClimateScenarioInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected permafrost extent changes under different climate scenarios with spatial heatmaps"
]

instance PolicyRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Evidence-based policy suggestions for permafrost adaptation strategies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data quality metrics including completeness, accuracy, and temporal consistency"
]

instance SensorMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated work order generation for sensor recalibration or replacement based on quality metrics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]


instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The documents describe a **Digital Twin (DT) framework** for a **Cyber-Physical System (CPS)** (e.g., incubator case study) with the following **safety-related components**:
  - **Safety Monitoring**: The DT includes **monitors** that check whether the **Physical Twin (PT)** (e.g., incubator) is performing **safely and optimally** (Document 3). This involves real-time validation of system behavior against predefined safety thresholds.
  - **Fault Detection**: Algorithms (e.g., **fault detectors**) are used to identify deviations or failures in the PT (Document 3). These are part of the **algorithms** layer in the DT, which manipulates data and models to generate insights.
  - **Supervisory Control**: The DT employs **supervisory controllers** (Document 13) to enforce corrective actions when violations are detected, ensuring the system adheres to safety constraints.
  - **Calibration and Model Updates**: The DT uses **calibration algorithms** to update models of the CPS and environment with the **best estimate of parameters** (Document 3), ensuring models remain accurate for safety-critical predictions.
  - **Self-Adaptive Mechanisms**: The DT leverages **self-adaptive systems** (Document 7, 8) to dynamically adjust to changes in the environment or PT, maintaining safety under varying conditions.
  - **Models@Runtime**: The DT integrates **Models@run.time** (Document 11, 12) to continuously validate and adapt models during operation, ensuring safety-critical decisions are data-driven.
  - **Hardware Redundancy**: The incubator case study includes **two temperature sensors** for internal monitoring and **one external sensor** (Document 4), providing redundancy for critical measurements.
  - **Fail-Safe Design**: While not explicitly detailed, the DT’s reliance on **real-time monitoring** and **corrective algorithms** implies a fail-safe approach to mitigate risks (e.g., overheating in the incubator).
  **Technologies/Tools Mentioned**:
  - **Python (SciPy, Functional Mockup Units - FMU)**: Used for rapid prototyping and simulation (Document 14, 15, 17).
  - **RabbitMQ FMU**: Enables **formally verified data brokerage** for real-time communication between DT components (Document 17).
  - **Kalman Filter**: Implied for **state estimation** (Document 16), critical for accurate monitoring in safety-critical systems.
  **Limitations**:
  - No explicit mention of **cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., encryption, access control, authentication).
  - No details on **compliance with regulations** (e.g., GDPR, ISO 26262 for safety).
  - No **data anonymization** or **consent management** procedures for privacy."
]
